creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
Created attachment 237074
Build log of www/obhttpd from console

(In reply to Nikola Kolev from comment #1)
>
> Could you please upload the entire log to take a look?

I tried again after updating my ports snapshot, and still no dice.  The compiling system uses /usr/ports over NFSv4, so I also tried compiling the package directly on the NFS host and it fails there as well.  In both cases, it's looking for a missing imsg.h file when it gets to the core obhttpd source files.

Build log attached, copied directly from my console window (if there is another log file you're after, let me know).
